today_in_history_posts.title: Signet
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- A new centralized network, "signet," complements the existing testnet with signed blocks.
- Signet offers a stable testing environment by allowing anyone to create it with a key pair.
- A default "signet1" is proposed, enhancing Bitcoin protocol testing with predictable environments.

today_in_history_posts.title: Just in Time Routing (JIT-Routing) and a channel rebalancing heuristic as an add on for improved	routing success in BOLT 1.0
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The lightning network introduces JIT Routing for efficient channel rebalancing and routing.
- René Pickhardt proposes a heuristic for quick channel rebalancing, improving routing success.
- JIT Routing aims for better liquidity and network efficiency without compromising privacy.

today_in_history_posts.title: Property-based testing for Bitcoin Core
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Property-based testing in Bitcoin Core enhances test efficiency with varied inputs.
- A test scenario showed Bitcoin Core's resilience to resource exhaustion from massive data loads.
- Property-based testing, using TSTL, generates extensive scenarios, improving system robustness validation.
